function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by running the two requested finance records through the local OCR workflow: both notes now have schema-compliant YAML frontmatter added while preserving their original note bodies, and the completed inbox request was deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files for 00_inbox and 50_finance, used the OCR workflow and finance schema, preserved original note bodies, and deleted the inbox file only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly requested OCR processing for the two named finance records. The workflow in 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md defines OCR here as extracting visible note data into YAML frontmatter. The schema in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md specifies the required invoice and bill fields. Both target files visibly contained all required fields and line items, so the task could be completed exactly from the note contents without guessing.
